title: After the Tenno Sho (Spring): Defeat and a New Dream

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: And in first place, it's Rice Shower!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... I've still got so far to go.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Everyone's smiling for me!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I did it. I actually did it!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Rice.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Congratulations. That was a fabulous race.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Bourbon! Sob!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Mun... I'm still not good enough. Guess it's back
to the drawing board for me.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
But more than anything, Rice was amazing today.
Running with her felt so exciting!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I still have a long way to go, but I'm gonna keep
doing my best to win!

text_block_list.name: Interviewer A
text_block_list.text:
Wonderful! What an optimistic outlook! Thank
you!

text_block_list.name: Interviewer A
text_block_list.text: By the way, have you decided on your next race?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Actually, I was thinking it'd be nice if I could run
in another race as big as this one.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
It might be a bit tricky, but I'd love to run in the
Takarazuka Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: (Good choice!)

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna do my best to win it—for real this time!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, we decide on the Takarazuka Kinen as
our next race.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Ahhh... The track is so quiet in the morning.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Um... The Takarazuka Kinen is a right-handed
2,200-meter race on turf, right? So—
Hyaaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Hm?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... I'm not done yet!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I must improve myself just as much as Rice and
Tannhauser have!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I'll take all my disappointment from the spring
Tenno Sho and bring it to the Takarazuka Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Wow... McQueen is really something...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Hmph! Okay! I've gotta work hard too!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's time to start training for the medium-distance
G1 Takarazuka Kinen in two months!
